name: ripx
description: RipX - Professional AB Testing Platform for Shopify Stores

scripts.dev: npm run dev:guard:ports && concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix extensions/ripx-checkout-discount install && npm --prefix extensions/ripx-cart-transform install && npm --prefix extensions/ripx-checkout-ui install && npm --prefix extensions/ripx-payment-customization install && npm --prefix extensions/ripx-delivery-customization install
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix:backend && npm run lint:fix:frontend
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.shopify:dev:local:safe: npm run shopify:cleanup:workers && npm run shopify:guard:ports && npm run shopify:sanitize:local-toml && npm run shopify:guard:local && npm run shopify:dev:local
scripts.shopify:dev:local:verbose: npm run shopify:cleanup:workers && npm run shopify:guard:ports && npm run shopify:sanitize:local-toml && npm run shopify:guard:local && shopify app dev --config shopify.app.local.toml --verbose
scripts.shopify:dev:production:safe: npm run shopify:guard:ports && npm run shopify:guard:production && npm run shopify:dev:production
scripts.shopify:dev:local:localhost:safe: npm run shopify:cleanup:workers && npm run shopify:guard:ports && npm run shopify:sanitize:local-toml && npm run shopify:guard:local && npm run shopify:dev:localhost
scripts.shopify:deploy:production:safe: npm run shopify:guard:production && npm run shopify:extensions:prepare && npm run shopify:deploy:production
scripts.shopify:guard:local: node scripts/verify-shopify-config-match.js --config shopify.app.local.toml && node scripts/verify-shopify-local-dev-ready.js --config shopify.app.local.toml
scripts.shopify:guard:production:env: node scripts/verify-shopify-config-match.js --config shopify.app.production.toml --env-file .env.production && node scripts/verify-oauth-url-alignment.js --config shopify.app.production.toml --env-file .env.production
scripts.shopify:checkout-discount:prepare: npm run shopify:checkout-discount:install && npm run shopify:checkout-discount:sync-config && npm run shopify:checkout-discount:typegen && npm run shopify:checkout-discount:build
scripts.shopify:checkout-ui:prepare: npm run shopify:checkout-ui:install && npm run shopify:checkout-ui:sync-config
scripts.shopify:extensions:prepare: npm run shopify:checkout-discount:prepare && npm run shopify:checkout-ui:prepare && npm run shopify:cart-transform:prepare && npm run shopify:payment-customization:prepare && npm run shopify:delivery-customization:prepare
scripts.shopify:cart-transform:prepare: npm run shopify:cart-transform:install && npm run shopify:cart-transform:typegen && npm run shopify:cart-transform:build
scripts.shopify:payment-customization:prepare: npm run shopify:payment-customization:install && npm run shopify:payment-customization:typegen && npm run shopify:payment-customization:build
scripts.shopify:delivery-customization:prepare: npm run shopify:delivery-customization:install && npm run shopify:delivery-customization:typegen && npm run shopify:delivery-customization:build
scripts.audit: npm audit && npm --prefix frontend audit && npm run audit:extensions
scripts.audit:extensions: npm --prefix extensions/ripx-checkout-discount audit && npm --prefix extensions/ripx-cart-transform audit && npm --prefix extensions/ripx-checkout-ui audit && npm --prefix extensions/ripx-payment-customization audit && npm --prefix extensions/ripx-delivery-customization audit
